subcodes.first_line: O thou illustrious soul! O thou the great pillar of the palace of universal peace
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شخص جلیل و ای رکن عظیم صلح عمومی مدتی بود که اراده مکاتبه با شما نموده
subcodes.subjects: @the Lesser Peace and the Most Great Peace, @unity; oneness of humanity, @present and future calamities; war; universal convulsion, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @growth of the Cause
